nextMass.title: Sunday Parish Eucharist
nextMass.body: The current parish schedule also lists Thursday and Friday Adoration at 11:30am, Mass at 12:00 noon, and Stations of the Cross on Sunday at about 12:30pm.
nextMass.note: This week's published timetable also includes a Friday Lenten Area House Mass at 7:00pm at 8 Ingmire Road, Eastville, BS5 6XD.

quickCards.title: Sunday
items: First Sunday: Signed Parish Mass for the Deaf Community

quickCards.title: Confession
items: Sacramental enquiries through the parish office

links.label: Mass and livestream details on this site

serviceCards.title: Mass Times
paragraphs: Sunday Parish Mass is currently published at 10:00am.
The parish site also lists weekday liturgy on Thursday and Friday, with seasonal liturgies announced in the weekly highlights and diary.
items: This week's Friday Lenten Area House Mass: 7:00pm at 8 Ingmire Road, Eastville, BS5 6XD

serviceCards.title: Livestream
paragraphs: Sunday 10:00am Parish Mass is streamed online, including the first-Sunday Signed Parish Mass for the Deaf Community.

serviceCards.title: Confession / Sacraments
paragraphs: Baptisms, marriages, funerals, and anointing are arranged through the parish office.
items: Sacrament of Reconciliation: Saturday after Mass
Sacramental enquiries through the parish office

serviceCards.title: Special Liturgies
paragraphs: The parish publishes seasonal liturgies through its weekly highlights, diary, and newsletters.
items: Sunday Stations of the Cross in Lent
Monthly Mass for people with special needs with the Clifton Catholic Fellowship: first Sunday at 3:00pm

serviceCards.title: Deaf Community Mass
paragraphs: The homepage currently advertises a Signed Parish Mass for the Deaf Community on the first Sunday of the month at 10:00am.
A separate monthly Deaf Community Mass at 3:00pm is noted on the parish site as suspended due to lack of support.

serviceCards.title: LGBTQ+ Mass
paragraphs: The parish site lists a Mass with the LGBTQ+ community on the third Sunday of the month at 3:00pm.

contact.officeHoursSummary: Office enquiries are generally welcomed Monday to Friday, 10:00am to 1:00pm.
contact.priestAvailability: Fr Richard is normally available Thursday to Sunday rather than Monday to Wednesday.
